diagrams.title: Viewing Coordinate System
diagrams.description: Shows VRP at origin with VPN along -Z axis and VUP along Y axis
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how viewing orientation is defined in 3D space

diagrams.title: Viewing Frustum
diagrams.description: Pyramidal shape with truncated tip showing near and far clipping planes
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the volume of 3D space that gets rendered to screen

diagrams.title: Window to Viewport Mapping
diagrams.description: Rectangle in world coordinates mapping to rectangle on screen
diagrams.purpose: Understanding 2D viewing transformation and coordinate mapping

diagrams.title: Perspective vs Parallel Projection
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of how 3D cube appears under both projections
elements: Parallel: parallel lines, no depth distortion
diagrams.purpose: Comparing output effects of different projection types

diagrams.title: Complete Viewing Pipeline
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing stages from modeling to device coordinates
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the sequence of transformations in rendering

visuals.title: Classical And Computer Viewing
visuals.description: Visual diagram for classical and computer viewing
